mapper.insert: insert into notification_resend_fail_record (notification_id, send_record_id, user_id, user_type, student_user_id, fail_reason_1, fail_message_1, fail_reason_2, fail_message_2, fail_reason_3, fail_message_3, fail_count, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{notificationId}, #{sendRecordId}, #{userId}, #{userType}, #{studentUserId}, #{failReason1}, #{failMessage1}, #{failReason2}, #{failMessage2}, #{failReason3}, #{failMessage3}, #{failCount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, notification_id, send_record_id, user_id, user_type, student_user_id, fail_reason_1, fail_message_1, fail_reason_2, fail_message_2, fail_reason_3, fail_message_3, fail_count, status, create_time, update_time from notification_resend_fail_record where notification_id = #{notificationId}
